error.signature: AI tells a tourist or new resident in Switzerland to plan grocery shopping on Sunday or do laundry / vacuum on Sunday in apartment buildings

verdict.summary: Swiss federal law (Arbeitsgesetz) restricts Sunday work; cantonal Sonntagsverkaufsverbot bans most retail Sunday opening. Exceptions: rail-station shops (Zurich HB, Bern, Basel SBB), gas stations, airport, tourist towns up to 2-4 Sundays/year. Apartment Hausordnungs commonly enforce Sundays-quiet (no vacuum, washing machine, drilling) plus 12-13:00 lunch quiet + 22:00-06:00 night. Swiss recycling separation is strict (multiple bin types, fees per bag in many cantons).

dead_ends.action: Plan to grocery shop in Zurich / Geneva / Bern / Basel on Sunday
dead_ends.why_fails: Migros, Coop, Aldi, Denner closed Sunday in most cities. Train-station Migros / Coop branches open (limited hours: ~7-22). Tourist-zone supermarkets in Interlaken / Zermatt may open in season but unreliable. Plan Saturday shopping; some areas allow 2-4 'Sonntagsverkauf' per year (advertised in advance).

dead_ends.action: Run washing machine, vacuum, or take recycling glass to bin on Sunday in Swiss apartment
dead_ends.why_fails: Hausordnungs across Switzerland enforce Sunday quiet. Glass recycling at communal bin is restricted Sundays + after 20:00 (the noise wakes neighbors). Vacuum / washing machine forbidden. Neighbors leave notes; repeat offenses can prompt landlord warning.

dead_ends.action: Throw mixed garbage into a free public bin without using designated bag
dead_ends.why_fails: Most Swiss cantons require Gebührensack / Sac taxe (per-bag-fee garbage bag) costing CHF 1.50-3 per 35L. Using unmarked bag triggers Müllpolizei investigation — they search bag for sender's identity and fine CHF 100-300.

workarounds.action: Sunday alternatives: train-station shops (open until ~22:00), restaurant brunch, museums, hiking, ski. Stock food Saturday. Some bakeries open Sunday morning until ~12:00.

Apartment activity: Mon-Sat 07:00-12:00, 13:00-22:00 for noisy tasks. Sunday: silent. Glass recycling: weekdays 07:00-20:00 (canton-specific). Recycle paper / cardboard / PET / aluminum monthly per Hausordnung schedule.

Buy Gebührensack at Migros / Coop / kiosk for your canton (different colors / brands by canton). Use only that bag for general garbage. Recyclables (PET / glass / aluminum / paper / electronics) free at recycling stations.
